2.0 Methods 

Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
Impact of Transition from 27 to 30 CCW Chronic Conditions │ March 2022 │ V 1.0 6 

2.2 Comparison of Ever Dates 

The algorithms for the 30 CCW Chronic Conditions data file use only ICD-10-CM diagnosis codes, which means the first 
full calendar year that the CCW team could use to identify conditions is 2016. Therefore, the earliest possible date that 
could appear in the “ever” date fields is January 1, 2016. This is a difference between the 27 CCW
